title: Not a Rock
lyrics:
[verse]
There's a crocodile who lives in the pond
He says he's a rock but we're not so fond
He tries to sit still, he tries not to blink
But every single time, he falls in with a PLINK

[chorus]
He's not a rock, no no no
He's not a rock, he's a croc
He's got big teeth and a big green tail
He's not a rock, he's a croc

[verse]
He painted himself grey on Monday
Tried to be a pebble on a Sunday
A bird sat on his head, he said EXCUSE ME
The bird said rocks don't talk, and flew into a tree

[chorus]
He's not a rock, no no no
He's not a rock, he's a croc
He's got big teeth and a big green tail
He's not a rock, he's a croc

[bridge]
One day he'll be the best rock in the world
The quietest, stillest, most rocky rock
But until that day...

[chorus]
He's not a rock, no no no
He's not a rock, he's a croc
He's got big teeth and a big green tail
He's not a rock, he's a croc
Goodnight, little croc
style_prompt: children's song, funny, upbeat, ukulele, claps, glockenspiel, bouncy, playful, 120 BPM, cheerful male vocal, simple melody, catchy chorus, cartoon-like, silly, bright, nursery rhyme energy
cover_description: A big green crocodile lying completely flat on the ground trying to look like a grey rock, with a tiny confused bird sitting on his head. The crocodile's eyes are wide open, trying not to blink. Small music notes floating around. Pond setting, simple green and blue background.
